title: stelis brenesii
intro: Stelis brenesii, also known as the Bree's stelis or Bree's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in local remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
